data.name: Company has an approved Incident Response Plan
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Incident Response Plan](/policies/incident-response-plan-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Incident Response Plan yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Incident%20Response%20Plan) to create and approve a custom Incident Response Plan for your company.
